blockers.name: City launch needs live response, applicant, operator, or buyer signal

blockers.name: Buyer direct outreach needs explicit recipient-backed contact evidence
blockers.why: Explicit buyer recipient evidence exists, but live buyer send still requires proof-led copy and approval.

blockers.name: Sender verification and durable reply resume must be production-proven
blockers.why: Outbound launchability requires truthful sender state, and blocker/resume loops require a durable reply watcher rather than Slack-only visibility.
blockers.nextAction: Run npm run human-replies:audit-durability, set the missing live env/provider state, then prove a tagged reply resumes execution.

blockers.name: Ad/content/campaign lanes are intentionally draft-first for live side effects
blockers.lane: ads, content, campaign sends, brand assets
blockers.stageReached: Ad Studio can create briefs/handoffs; growth campaigns write drafts; live sends/public posts/paid spend require approval.
blockers.why: This is the correct guardrail until product policy defines narrow auto-publish or paid-spend criteria.
blockers.nextAction: Keep draft creation autonomous; add narrow auto-approval only after a product/doctrine decision.

blockers.name: Marketing integrations require provider and Notion Growth Studio config
blockers.lane: Meta ads, Growth Studio Notion mirror, Firehose/Introw enrichment
blockers.why: Adapters exist, but the runtime cannot create paused Meta drafts or mirror Growth Studio proof without configured providers.
blockers.nextAction: Provide only the provider credentials you want enabled; leave unsupported providers disabled and draft-only.

blockers.name: Scheduled content/city routines must be explicit about active vs paused posture
blockers.lane: proactive content, broadcast, city launch refresh
blockers.stageReached: active=capturer-growth-weekly, demand-intel-weekly, robot-team-growth-weekly, site-operator-partnership-weekly, city-demand-weekly; paused=community-updates-weekly, ship-broadcast-refresh, ship-broadcast-approval-refresh, content-feedback-refresh, city-launch-weekly, city-launch-refresh, demand-intel-daily
blockers.why: Manual/event-driven execution can work while paused schedules remain intentionally quiet. This should be explicit, not rediscovered in audits.
blockers.nextAction: Only unpause routines that are drill-proven and produce proof-bearing artifacts without live side effects.

publicBridgeIssue.description:
# Autonomous Growth Blocker Bridge - Durham, NC

This issue bridges the founder-visible Paperclip control plane to the current repo-backed blocker artifact.

- generated_at: 2026-04-24T15:01:51.352Z
- overall_status: blocked
- blocker_report_json: /Users/nijelhunt_1/workspace/Blueprint-WebApp/ops/paperclip/reports/autonomous-growth-blockers/durham-nc/2026-04-24T15-01-51-741Z/blocker-status.json
- blocker_report_markdown: /Users/nijelhunt_1/workspace/Blueprint-WebApp/ops/paperclip/reports/autonomous-growth-blockers/durham-nc/2026-04-24T15-01-51-741Z/blocker-status.md
- latest_city_manifest: ops/paperclip/reports/city-launch-execution/durham-nc/2026-04-22T21-47-28.818Z/manifest.json

Use this issue as the public execution pointer until full Paperclip company-state migration is intentionally performed.

Current blockers:
- warning: Public Paperclip state must match trusted local org state -> Use the bridge issue for immediate execution continuity; schedule full company-state migration only if historic issue continuity is required.
- external_gated: City launch needs live response, applicant, operator, or buyer signal -> Execute the no-signal recovery lanes and record an explicit reply, applicant, qualified intro, or no-response outcome.
- human_gated: Buyer direct outreach needs explicit recipient-backed contact evidence -> Create buyer-specific draft actions and send only after approval/transport checks.
- warning: Sender verification and durable reply resume must be production-proven -> Verify sender/domain in the live mail provider, set the sender verification mirror, and configure/prove Gmail reply watcher resume.
- human_gated: Ad/content/campaign lanes are intentionally draft-first for live side effects -> Keep draft creation autonomous; add narrow auto-approval only after a product/doctrine decision.
- blocked: Marketing integrations require provider and Notion Growth Studio config -> Provide only the provider credentials you want enabled; leave unsupported providers disabled and draft-only.
- warning: Scheduled content/city routines must be explicit about active vs paused posture -> Only unpause routines that are drill-proven and produce proof-bearing artifacts without live side effects.
